CREATE TABLE test_int (value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_int VALUES (1), (2), (3), (999);
SELECT CAST(value AS TINYINT) FROM test_int WHERE value <= 127;
SELECT CAST(value AS TINYINT) FROM test_int WHERE value > 127;
SELECT CAST(value AS DOUBLE) FROM test_int;
CREATE TABLE test_float (value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_float VALUES (3.5), (5.7), (7.9);
SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) FROM test_float;
CREATE TABLE test_varchar (value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_varchar VALUES ('10'), ('20.5'), ('NotANumber');
SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) FROM test_varchar WHERE value NOT LIKE 'NotANumber';
SELECT CAST(value AS INTEGER) FROM test_varchar WHERE value LIKE 'NotANumber';
CREATE TABLE test_array (value INTEGER[]);
INSERT INTO test_array VALUES ([1, 2, 3]), ([4, 5, 6]);
SELECT CAST(value AS VARCHAR[]) FROM test_array;
SELECT CAST(CAST(value AS VARCHAR[]) AS INTEGER[]) FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE test_struct (value STRUCT(a INTEGER, b INTEGER));
INSERT INTO test_struct VALUES (ROW(1, 2)), (ROW(3, 4));
SELECT CAST(value AS STRUCT(a VARCHAR, b VARCHAR)) FROM test_struct;
CREATE TABLE test_union (value UNION(STRUCT(a INTEGER), STRUCT(b VARCHAR)));
INSERT INTO test_union VALUES (ROW(1, NULL)), (ROW(NULL, 'string'));
SELECT CAST(value AS STRUCT(a VARCHAR, b VARCHAR)) FROM test_union;
CREATE TABLE test_implicit (id INTEGER, val FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_implicit VALUES (1, 3.14), (2, 2.71);
SELECT sin(val) FROM test_implicit WHERE id = 1;
SELECT CAST(id AS DOUBLE) + val FROM test_implicit;
